economic_notes: Gas Bar and Convenience Store expansion in progress ($4,228,815 invested). Health Facility expansion in progress ($374,500 invested). Band Housing projects under construction ($650,775). Section 95 CMHC 6-unit housing project under construction ($640,644). VLT program operated on-reserve. Nation operates convenience store and gas bar.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Six entities consolidated including VLT program, convenience store/gas bar, housing authority, and water/waste utility. No schedule of remuneration included. Capital projects segment includes flood damage repair and on-reserve housing development. Large construction in progress balance of approximately $5,894,069 held off balance sheet pending project completion. CMHC advances payable of $640,644 for incomplete Section 95 project noted. Net debt position of $16,199,355. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with unknown financial impact. Economic dependence on ISC funding noted.
